\tzpentry{ID3309}{Vector Potential Expansion}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3309 introduces Vector Potential Expansion as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \mathbf{A}(r, \theta, \phi,t) = \sum_{nlm} \mathbf{A}_{nlm} \, j_n(k_{nl}^B r) \, \mathbf{Y}_l^m( \theta, \phi) \, e^{-i \Omega_{nl}t} \end{equation}
